message.content:
{
  "round": 3,
  "parent_reward_id": "round2_candidate1_progress_conditioned",
  "selected_candidate_id": "round3_candidate1_progress_conditioned",
  "mutation_family": "progress_conditioned",
  "observed_outcome": {
    "coarse_result": "partial_and_success_like_available",
    "main_failure_remaining": "success_like_trajectories_exist_but_not_high_confidence",
    "main_success_signal": "training_return_positive_6.04_with_10_success_like_trajectories"
  },
  "failure_repair_outcome": {
    "failure_before": "structural component misalignment: stability_near penalizes near-pad partial_progress, terminal_penalty applied to non-crashes, approach_progress does not discriminate quality; no success-like trajectories",
    "repair_attempt": "progress_conditioned mutation with component adjustments: preserved approach_progress, leg_bonus, near_stability, proximity_bonus, terminal_bonus, terminal_failure_penalty, terminal_penalty; removed/gated low_progress_survival_gate, stability_near, terminal_reward, ungated_contact_bonus, ungated_survival_bonus",
    "outcome_after": "success_like trajectories emerged (10 out of 50 in trajectory judgment), training return improved to 6.04, label margins sufficient but success_like not yet high-confidence"
  },
  "lesson": "Progress-conditioned mutations that remove or gate misaligned components (stability_near, terminal_reward) and preserve progress incentives can finally produce success_like trajectories, but the transition from partial_progress to success_like remains fragile; terminal bonus achievability and clear crash penalties must be further refined to make success_like trajectories high-confidence.",
  "future_guidance": [
    "preserve progress-conditioned gating and components that favor partial_progress",
    "strengthen terminal_bonus to be reliably achievable with moderate speed and both legs contact",
    "continue to avoid global survival bonus without progress gating",
    "explore component_recomposition to further align terminal handling for high-confidence success_like",
    "consider constructing preference pairs only after success_like confidence improves"
  ],
  "archive_update": {
    "add_to_elite_archive": true,
    "rollback_triggered": false,
    "next_parent_reward_id": "round3_candidate1_progress_conditioned",
    "reason": "Candidate achieved positive training return and 10 success_like trajectories, added to elite archive; no rollback needed"
  },
  "uncertainties": [
    "Success_like trajectories are present but not yet high-confidence for preference pair construction",
    "Component alignment diagnoses still indicate potential over-reward of low-quality trajectories",
    "Novelty score low (0.009), candidate is similar to previous",
    "Training return improvement may be temporary; requires monitoring"
  ]
}
